title: Arlexia
description: This is a horror modpack focused on simplicity, immersion, and fear.
body:
Arlexia focuses on keeping Minecraft's core gameplay intact while imrpoving immersion with shaders, sounds, and striking fear into the player! Arlexia does this by adding mobs that feel distant but personal creating that sense of "am I really alone?". Arlexia also includes terrain generation mods mainly to introduce a lot of foliage to hide creatures better.

Arlexia is optomized to work on a Forge server as well.

Also this modpack works on Apple Silicon Macbooks!
